descriptions.flag_high_amount: Purchase amount (${amount}) is significantly higher than this card's usual spending (${card_mean_amount} average).
descriptions.flag_amount_zscore: Transaction amount is highly unusual for this card (${amount_zscore} standard deviations from normal spending).
descriptions.flag_night_tx: Transaction occurred during overnight hours (${hour}:00), when this type of activity is less common.
descriptions.flag_cross_border: Purchase was made in ${merchant_country}, while the cardholder is based in ${cardholder_country}.
descriptions.flag_high_velocity: High transaction activity detected: ${velocity_1h} other transactions were made on this card within the last hour.
descriptions.flag_burst: Multiple purchases were made in quick succession (${velocity_burst} transactions within 15 minutes).
descriptions.flag_high_risk_cat: Purchase was made with a merchant in a higher-risk category (${merchant_category}).
descriptions.gift_card_spree: Multiple gift card purchases detected within the last 24 hours.
descriptions.electronics_spree: Multiple electronics purchases detected within the last 24 hours.
descriptions.flag_round_amount: Transaction amount is an exact round value (${amount}).
descriptions.flag_many_merchants: This card has been used at an unusually large number of different merchants recently.
descriptions.flag_device_multi: Device ${device_id} has been associated with multiple payment cards.
descriptions.flag_ip_multi: IP address ${ip_address} has been associated with multiple payment cards.
descriptions.is_test_charge_pattern: Possible card-testing behavior detected: a small transaction (${prev_amount}) was followed by a larger charge (${amount}).
